title: Add task-state mirror reconciliation gate
description: Implement a focused MAP gate that compares canonical SQLite task state with file mirrors in MAP_System/tasks/TASK-*.json and MAP_System/workflow/task_graph.json before review/release, addressing TASK-140/TASK-141 findings about manual SQLite/file sync drift. Also record a short systems-use decision note answering whether Emergence/Insights and Research need improvement or forced adoption.
acceptance_criteria: A validator detects mismatches between SQLite task status/output_paths and task JSON mirrors plus workflow/task_graph.json for active tasks.
Release/review workflow has a documented or scripted way to run the mirror check.
Regression tests cover matching state and deliberate mismatch cases.
A durable note answers the systems-use question: which systems are used, which remain specification-only, and whether Emergence/Insights or Research needs immediate improvement.
